texto: To be able to possess a machine in such a way is the ultimate show of determination and awareness. It makes one realize that the physicality of our world is a boundary to us only if our will is weak
autor: a true champion can accomplish things that a normal person would think impossible.
explicacao: Citação de a true champion can accomplish things that a normal person would think impossible. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “To be able to possess a machine in such a way is the ultimate show of determination and awareness…” articula reflexao, garth-stein, the-art-of-racing-in-the-rain em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e the-art-of-racing-in-the-rain.
